title: GEO Action Item
description: A single actionable recommendation in a GEO AI Visibility Roadmap. Designed to be forward-compatible with a web dashboard.

title.description: Short, action-oriented title shown in roadmap tables and headings

scoreComponent.description: Which GEO scoring component this primarily affects

sourceFinding.description: The raw finding from the audit that triggered this action item (populated at generation time)

description.description: One or two sentence plain-English description of what the action involves

whyItMatters.description: Why AI systems care about this signal, in customer-facing language. Avoid 'ranking for prompt X' framing.

controlLevel.description: How much direct control the business has over implementing this

estimatedScoreImpact.description: Expected improvement to GEO score if fully implemented

priorityScore.description: Computed 0-100 priority score. Higher = act sooner. Deterministic — see action_plan_generator.py.

peakwebFit.description: How Peakweb fits into delivering this action

timeHorizon.description: When this should realistically be addressed

isFoundational.description: True if this action unblocks or amplifies other actions (foundational items get priority bonus)

affectedPlatforms.description: Which AI platforms benefit from this action

implementationNotes.description: Concise implementation guidance for whoever does the work

platformSpecificNotes.description: Notes tailored to the detected CMS or platform (e.g. WordPress, Shopify)

customerSpecificRecommendation.description: Recommendation copy tailored to this specific customer's context and business type

evidence.description: Specific findings from the audit that back up this action item

dependencies.description: IDs of other action items that should be completed before or alongside this one
